titleStmt.title: SII 17.561: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 561. (A.R. No. 518 of 1904.) TĒVŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Dēvapurīśvara temple.

On grounds of palaeography the king Jaṭāvarmaṉ Sundarapāṇḍya may be identified with the second king of that name and the details of date given, viz., 1[1]th year, Vṛiśchika, ba. 6, Wednesday, Pūśam, correspond to 1287 A.D., October 29, Wednesday.

This inscription records the grant of lands after purchasing the same from the temple for 150 paṇam, to god Tiru-Ādittīśvaram-uḍaiyār in Tiruttēvūr in Tēvūrnāḍu in Arumoḻidēva-vaḷanāḍu, as capital for performing the Āṭkoṇḍanāyakaṉ-sandhi named after the donor, just after the early morning service, by Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷaṉ, Āṭkoṇḍanāyakaṉ of Teṉguḍi, a lease-holder in Mēnilappāḍi alias Vīrarājēndrapuram in Tiruvārūr-kūṟṟam in Gēyamāṇikka-vaḷanāḍu. The temple authorities undertook to conduct the service even in times of floods and draught.
This money received as price for the land was utilised by the temple authorities to construct in stone the structure above the kumudaga-ppaḍai and kōvaḷam in the tiru-agra-maṇḍapam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koṟccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ
śrī cuntirapāṇṭiyatevaṟkku yāṇṭu 11 vatu mṛūcciyanā
yaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu ṣaṣṭiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pū
cattunāḷ Arumoḻitevavaḷanāṭṭu tevūr nāṭ
ṭu tiruttevūr Uṭaiyār tiru Ātitticuramuṭaiyār
koyil Āticaṇṭecuratevarkaṉmikaḷom kal
veṭṭi kuṭutta paricāvatu keyamāṇikkavaḷanāṭṭu tiru
vāruṟ kūṟṟattu menilappāṭiyāṉa virarā[je*]ntirapurattu kāṇi
Uṭaiya teṉkuṭaiyāṉ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷaṉ Āṭkoṇṭa
nāyakaṉ Uṭaiyāṟkku ciṟukālai cantikālapūcai Āṉapiṉpu Ivar
cantiyāka Āṭkoṇṭa nāyakaṉ cantiyeṉṟu Āṭi Aruḷi Amutu
ceytaruḷat tirumañcaṉam tiruppaḷḷittāmam tirumeṟpūccut tiru
viḷakkeṇṇai Amutupaṭi Arici patakku kaṟi Amutuḷḷiṭṭa viñ
caṉaṅkaḷukkum Uṭaṟkoḷpaṭi veṇṭumavaiyiṟṟukku
tirunāmattukkāṇiyile Iraṇṭe Orumānilam vilai ko
ṇṭu Ippaṭi celvatāka kalveṭṭik kuṭutta piṭārikoyilp
peruvaḻikku kiḻakku cāṭkaiyeṉṟum māmpaṭukai Eṉṟum per kū
vappaṭṭa kuṇṭuṭpaṭa taṭi 3ṉāl � Upama viracoḻamayakkalkki
ḻ tuṇṭattu taṭi 4ṉāl � kku niṉṟa mulaiyum Uḷ
ḷiṭṭa taṭi 4 ṉāl � Āka � Upa Innilam Iraṇṭe Orumāvukkum
vilaippaṭi �100 5 10 Ippaṇam nūṟṟa Aimpatum Iṉāyaṉār koyil tirua
kkiṟa maṇṭapam muṉpu tirukkaṟceytu niṉṟa kumutakappaṭaikku mel
tirukkaṟccātta vāṅki kovaḷattu kallaṭippikkavum paṭavu kūlikkum
pokaviṭṭom Iccanti Ivaṟkkum Ivar vaṟkkattāṟkkum santiṟātit
tavaraiyum celvatāka kalveṭṭikkuṭuttom teṉkuṭaiyāṉ A
ḻakiyamaṇavāḷaṉ Āṭkoṇṭanāyakaṟkku Āticaṇṭecuratevarkaṉmi
kaḷom Innilaṅkaḷ peruveḷḷam peruñcāvi pokilum I nivanta muṭ
ṭāmal celuttakkaṭavomākavum Ippaṭikku Ivai tevarkaṉmi Īcāṉapa
ṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu koyiṟkkaṇakku bahmappiriyaṉ Eḻuttu tevūr nāyaka paṇ
ṭitaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 17.561 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
